---
# title: "Identificación de falseamiento ENUSC"
# author: "Marzo 2024"
format:
  revealjs:
    auto-stretch: false
    margin: 0
    slide-number: true
    scrollable: true
    preview-links: auto
    logo: imagenes/logo_portada2.png
    css: ine_quarto_styles.css
    # footer: <https://quarto.org>
---

#

[]{.linea-superior} 
[]{.linea-inferior} 

<!---
 <img src="imagenes/logo_portada2.png" style="width: 20%"/>  
--->

<img src="imagenes/logo_portada2.png" width="20%"/>  


[**Deep Learning para Detección de Cambios en Cartografía**]{.big-par .center-justified}
[**Ciencia de Datos**]{.medium-par.center-justified}

[**Junio 2026**]{.big-par .center-justified}   


## [Contenidos]{.big-par}  

<!-- ::: {.incremental} -->

- Motivación

- Detección de Cambios

  - Dentro del LUC (in-LUC)

  - *Fuera del LUC (out-LUC)*

- Detección en Zonas de Cambio

  - Edificaciones (*buildings*)

  - Calles y caminos (*roads*)

- Ejemplos in-LUC

  - Cluster 12 (crecimiento nuevo sostenido)

  - Cluster 6 (crecimiento nuevo reciente)

  - Cluster 2 (crecimiento nuevo reciente)

- *Ejemplos out-LUC*

  - ...

## [Motivación]{.big-par}



## [Detección de Cambios]{.big-par}

<!-- ::: {.center}
![](imagenes/data/reg_08_01.png){width="100%"}
::: -->

<!-- ::: {.incremental .small-par}
![](imagenes/data/reg_08_01.png){width="100%"}
![](imagenes/data/reg_08_02.png){width="100%"}
::: -->

::: {.r-stack fragment-index=2 .center}

![](imagenes/data/reg_08_01.png){.fragment .fade-in-then-out width="100%"}

![](imagenes/data/reg_08_02.png){.fragment .fade-in-then-out width="100%"}

![](imagenes/data/reg_08_03.png){.fragment .fade-in-then-out width="100%"}

![](imagenes/data/reg_08_04.png){.fragment .fade-in-then-out width="100%"}

![](imagenes/data/reg_08_05.png){.fragment .fade-in-then-out width="100%"}

![](imagenes/data/reg_08_06.png){.fragment .fade-in-then-out width="100%"}


:::



## [Detección en Zonas de Cambio | Edificaciones (*buildings*)]{.big-par}

::: {.r-stack fragment-index=2 .center}

![](imagenes/data/cluster_12/P67536523705__20230416T0000__prompt_building__confidence_0_1.png){.fragment .fade-in-then-out width="90%"}

![](imagenes/data/cluster_12/P67536523705__20230416T0000__prompt_building__confidence_0_1__segmented_polygons.png){.fragment .fade-in-then-out width="90%"}

![](imagenes/data/cluster_12/P67536523705__20230416T0000__prompt_building__confidence_0_1__segmented_polygons_filtered.png){.fragment .fade-in-then-out width="90%"}

![](imagenes/data/cluster_12/P67536523705__20230416T0000__prompt_building__confidence_0_1__counts_coverage.png){.fragment .fade-in-then-out width="90%"}

:::



## [Detección en Zonas de Cambio | Calles y caminos (*roads*)]{.big-par}

::: {.r-stack fragment-index=2 .center}

![](imagenes/data/cluster_12/P67536523705__20230416T0000__prompt_road__confidence_0_15.png){.fragment .fade-in-then-out width="90%"}

![](imagenes/data/cluster_12/P67536523705__20230416T0000__prompt_road__confidence_0_15__segmented_polygons.png){.fragment .fade-in-then-out width="90%"}

![](imagenes/data/cluster_12/P67536523705__20230416T0000__prompt_road__confidence_0_15__segmented_polygons_filtered.png){.fragment .fade-in-then-out width="90%"}

![](imagenes/data/cluster_12/P67536523705__20230416T0000__prompt_road__confidence_0_15__counts_coverage.png){.fragment .fade-in-then-out width="90%"}

:::



## [Detección en Zonas de Cambio | Edificaciones (*buildings*)]{.big-par}

::: {.r-stack fragment-index=2 .center}

![](imagenes/data/cluster_12/P67536523705__20230416T0000__prompt_building__confidence_0_1__segmented_polygons_filtered.png){.fragment .fade-in-then-out width="90%"}

![](imagenes/data/cluster_12/P67536523705__20250221T0000__prompt_building__confidence_0_1__segmented_polygons_filtered.png){.fragment .fade-in-then-out width="90%"}

:::



## [Ejs. in-LUC | Cluster 12 (crec sostenido) | Edificaciones]{.big-par}

::: {.r-stack fragment-index=2 .center}

:::: {.fragment}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_12/P67536523705__20230416T0000__prompt_building__confidence_0_1__segmented_polygons_filtered.png){width="70%"}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_12/P67536523705__20230416T0000__prompt_building__confidence_0_1__counts_coverage.png){width="70%"}
::::

:::: {.fragment}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_12/P67536523705__20250221T0000__prompt_building__confidence_0_1__segmented_polygons_filtered.png){width="70%"}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_12/P67536523705__20250221T0000__prompt_building__confidence_0_1__counts_coverage.png){width="70%"}
::::

:::


## [Ejs. in-LUC | Cluster 06 (crec sostenido) | Edificaciones]{.big-par}

::: {.r-stack fragment-index=2 .center}

::: {.fragment}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_06/P67536475341__20230416T0000__prompt_building__confidence_0_15__segmented_polygons_filtered.png){width="70%"}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_06/P67536475341__20230416T0000__prompt_building__confidence_0_15__counts_coverage.png){width="70%"}
:::

::: {.fragment}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_06/P67536475341__20240309T0000__prompt_building__confidence_0_15__segmented_polygons.png){width="70%"}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_06/P67536475341__20240309T0000__prompt_building__confidence_0_15__counts_coverage.png){width="70%"}
:::

:::: {.fragment}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_06/P67536475341__20241210T0000__prompt_building__confidence_0_15__segmented_polygons_filtered.png){width="70%"}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_06/P67536475341__20241210T0000__prompt_building__confidence_0_15__counts_coverage.png){width="70%"}
::::

:::: {.fragment}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_06/P67536475341__20250221T0000__prompt_building__confidence_0_15__segmented_polygons_filtered.png){width="70%"}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_06/P67536475341__20250221T0000__prompt_building__confidence_0_15__counts_coverage.png){width="70%"}
::::

:::


## [Ejs. in-LUC | Cluster 02 (crec reciente) | Edificaciones]{.big-par}

::: {.r-stack fragment-index=2 .center}

:::: {.fragment}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_02/P67536771244__20230416T0000__prompt_building__confidence_0_15__segmented_polygons_filtered.png){width="70%"}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_02/P67536771244__20230416T0000__prompt_building__confidence_0_15__counts_coverage.png){width="70%"}
::::

:::: {.fragment}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_02/P67536771244__20240309T0000__prompt_building__confidence_0_15__segmented_polygons_filtered.png){width="70%"}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_02/P67536771244__20240309T0000__prompt_building__confidence_0_15__counts_coverage.png){width="70%"}
::::

:::: {.fragment}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_02/P67536771244__20241210T0000__prompt_building__confidence_0_15__segmented_polygons_filtered.png){width="70%"}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_02/P67536771244__20241210T0000__prompt_building__confidence_0_15__counts_coverage.png){width="70%"}
::::

:::: {.fragment}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_02/P67536771244__20250221T0000__prompt_building__confidence_0_15__segmented_polygons_filtered.png){width="70%"}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_02/P67536771244__20250221T0000__prompt_building__confidence_0_15__counts_coverage.png){width="70%"}
::::

:::



## [Ejs. in-LUC | Cluster 03 (pérdida) | Edificaciones]{.big-par}

::: {.r-stack fragment-index=2 .center}

:::: {.fragment}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_03_perd/P67536747320__20230416T0000__prompt_building__confidence_0_15__segmented_polygons_filtered.png){width="70%"}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_03_perd/P67536747320__20230416T0000__prompt_building__confidence_0_15__counts_coverage.png){width="70%"}
::::

:::: {.fragment}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_03_perd/P67536747320__20240309T0000__prompt_building__confidence_0_15__segmented_polygons_filtered.png){width="70%"}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_03_perd/P67536747320__20240309T0000__prompt_building__confidence_0_15__counts_coverage.png){width="70%"}
::::

:::: {.fragment}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_03_perd/P67536747320__20241210T0000__prompt_building__confidence_0_15__segmented_polygons_filtered.png){width="70%"}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_03_perd/P67536747320__20241210T0000__prompt_building__confidence_0_15__counts_coverage.png){width="70%"}
::::

:::: {.fragment}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_03_perd/P67536747320__20250221T0000__prompt_building__confidence_0_15__segmented_polygons_filtered.png){width="70%"}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_03_perd/P67536747320__20250221T0000__prompt_building__confidence_0_15__counts_coverage.png){width="70%"}
::::

:::



## [Ejs. in-LUC | Cluster 12 (crec sostenido) | Calles y caminos]{.big-par}

::: {.r-stack fragment-index=2 .center}

:::: {.fragment}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_12/P67536523705__20230416T0000__prompt_road__confidence_0_15__segmented_polygons_filtered.png){width="70%"}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_12/P67536523705__20230416T0000__prompt_road__confidence_0_15__counts_coverage.png){width="70%"}
::::

:::: {.fragment}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_12/P67536523705__20250221T0000__prompt_road__confidence_0_15__segmented_polygons_filtered.png){width="70%"}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_12/P67536523705__20250221T0000__prompt_road__confidence_0_15__counts_coverage.png){width="70%"}
::::

:::


## [Ejs. in-LUC | Cluster 06 (crec sostenido) | Calles y caminos]{.big-par}

::: {.r-stack fragment-index=2 .center}

::: {.fragment}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_06/P67536475341__20230416T0000__prompt_road__confidence_0_15__segmented_polygons_filtered.png){width="70%"}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_06/P67536475341__20230416T0000__prompt_road__confidence_0_15__counts_coverage.png){width="70%"}
:::

::: {.fragment}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_06/P67536475341__20240309T0000__prompt_road__confidence_0_15__segmented_polygons_filtered.png){width="70%"}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_06/P67536475341__20240309T0000__prompt_road__confidence_0_15__counts_coverage.png){width="70%"}
:::

:::: {.fragment}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_06/P67536475341__20241210T0000__prompt_road__confidence_0_15__segmented_polygons_filtered.png){width="70%"}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_06/P67536475341__20241210T0000__prompt_road__confidence_0_15__counts_coverage.png){width="70%"}
::::

:::: {.fragment}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_06/P67536475341__20250221T0000__prompt_road__confidence_0_15__segmented_polygons_filtered.png){width="70%"}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_06/P67536475341__20250221T0000__prompt_road__confidence_0_15__counts_coverage.png){width="70%"}
::::

:::


## [Ejs. in-LUC | Cluster 02 (crec reciente) | Calles y caminos]{.big-par}

::: {.r-stack fragment-index=2 .center}

:::: {.fragment}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_02/P67536771244__20230416T0000__prompt_road__confidence_0_15__segmented_polygons_filtered.png){width="70%"}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_02/P67536771244__20230416T0000__prompt_road__confidence_0_15__counts_coverage.png){width="70%"}
::::

:::: {.fragment}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_02/P67536771244__20240309T0000__prompt_road__confidence_0_15__segmented_polygons_filtered.png){width="70%"}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_02/P67536771244__20240309T0000__prompt_road__confidence_0_15__counts_coverage.png){width="70%"}
::::

:::: {.fragment}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_02/P67536771244__20241210T0000__prompt_road__confidence_0_15__segmented_polygons_filtered.png){width="70%"}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_02/P67536771244__20241210T0000__prompt_road__confidence_0_15__counts_coverage.png){width="70%"}
::::

:::: {.fragment}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_02/P67536771244__20250221T0000__prompt_road__confidence_0_15__segmented_polygons_filtered.png){width="70%"}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_02/P67536771244__20250221T0000__prompt_road__confidence_0_15__counts_coverage.png){width="70%"}
::::

:::



## [Ejs. in-LUC | Cluster 03 (pérdida) | Calles y caminos]{.big-par}

::: {.r-stack fragment-index=2 .center}

:::: {.fragment}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_03_perd/P67536747320__20230416T0000__prompt_road__confidence_0_15__segmented_polygons_filtered.png){width="70%"}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_03_perd/P67536747320__20230416T0000__prompt_road__confidence_0_15__counts_coverage.png){width="70%"}
::::

:::: {.fragment}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_03_perd/P67536747320__20240309T0000__prompt_road__confidence_0_15__segmented_polygons_filtered.png){width="70%"}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_03_perd/P67536747320__20240309T0000__prompt_road__confidence_0_15__counts_coverage.png){width="70%"}
::::

:::: {.fragment}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_03_perd/P67536747320__20241210T0000__prompt_road__confidence_0_15__segmented_polygons_filtered.png){width="70%"}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_03_perd/P67536747320__20241210T0000__prompt_road__confidence_0_15__counts_coverage.png){width="70%"}
::::

:::: {.fragment}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_03_perd/P67536747320__20250221T0000__prompt_road__confidence_0_15__segmented_polygons_filtered.png){width="70%"}
![](imagenes/data/cluster_03_perd/P67536747320__20250221T0000__prompt_road__confidence_0_15__counts_coverage.png){width="70%"}
::::

:::



<!-- ## [Ejemplos dentro del LUC | Cluster 12 | Edificaciones (*buildings*)]{.big-par}


:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="45%"}
[<img src="imagenes/data/cluster_12/P67536523705__20230416T0000__prompt_building__confidence_0_1__segmented_polygons_filtered.png" width="100%"/>]{.center} 
[<img src="imagenes/data/cluster_12/P67536523705__20230416T0000__prompt_building__confidence_0_1__counts_coverage.png" width="100%"/>]{.center} 
:::

::: {.column width="45%"}
[<img src="imagenes/data/cluster_12/P67536523705__20250221T0000__prompt_building__confidence_0_1__segmented_polygons_filtered.png" width="100%"/>]{.center} 
[<img src="imagenes/data/cluster_12/P67536523705__20250221T0000__prompt_building__confidence_0_1__counts_coverage.png" width="100%"/>]{.center} 
:::

:::: -->


#

[<img src="imagenes/logo_portada2.png" width="20%"/>]{.center}

[**Deep Learning para Detección de Cambios en Cartografía**]{.big-par .center-justified}
[**Ciencia de Datos**]{.medium-par.center-justified}

[**Junio 2026**]{.big-par .center-justified}


[]{.linea-superior} 
[]{.linea-inferior}
